---
title: "Student Self-Assessment (Printable)"
format:
  html:
    toc: false
---

::: {.print-checklist}

This one-page checklist is designed for printing and hand-marking.

Name: ____________________  Class: ____________________  Date: ____________________

## AS92005 Self-Check

### Purpose and audience

- [ ] I can clearly explain my purpose.
- [ ] I can clearly identify my intended audience.
- [ ] My pages are designed for that audience.

### Technical quality

- [ ] Navigation works across all pages.
- [ ] All required pages render correctly.
- [ ] Layout and readability are consistent.

### Environmental data + R integration

- [ ] I loaded an environmental dataset in R.
- [ ] I included at least one valid data output (chart/table/value).
- [ ] I explained my data output in plain language.

### Development process and testing

- [ ] My development log shows progress over time.
- [ ] I completed testing and documented feedback.
- [ ] I made improvements based on evidence.

### Evaluation quality

- [ ] I described strengths and limitations.
- [ ] I justified choices with specific evidence.
- [ ] I proposed realistic next steps.

## Grade readiness check

### Achieved ready

- [ ] Core functionality complete
- [ ] Basic process evidence complete
- [ ] Data requirement met

### Merit ready

- [ ] Multiple improvements from testing
- [ ] Audience-focused communication mostly effective
- [ ] Evaluation uses specific evidence

### Excellence ready

- [ ] Outcome is refined and highly fit for purpose
- [ ] Iteration is systematic and evidence-led
- [ ] Evaluation is critical and well justified

Teacher comment: ________________________________________________________________

Teacher provisional judgment:  Achieved / Merit / Excellence

:::
